name: pwa-guide
description: Progressive Web App development: service workers, manifest, offline-first, caching strategies, push notifications

entries.title: Web App Manifest Configuration
entries.content: manifest.json defines app metadata for install prompt. Required fields: name, short_name, start_url, display, icons. Use display: standalone for native feel. Set theme_color and background_color. Include 192x192 and 512x512 icons.

entries.title: Service Worker with Caching Strategies
entries.content: Service worker intercepts network requests. Strategies: Cache-First (static assets), Network-First (API calls), Stale-While-Revalidate (balance), Cache-Only (offline), Network-Only (real-time). Pre-cache critical resources on install.

entries.title: Offline-First Architecture
entries.content: Design for offline from the start. Use IndexedDB for structured data (via idb library). Queue mutations when offline, sync on reconnect. Show offline indicator. Cache API responses with timestamps for freshness.

entries.title: App Shell Architecture
entries.content: App shell: minimal HTML/CSS/JS for UI skeleton, loaded instantly from cache. Content filled dynamically. Fixed header, bottom nav, scrollable content area. Use skeleton screens as placeholders.

entries.title: Push Notifications Setup
entries.content: Request permission, subscribe to push service, send from server. Use VAPID keys for authentication. Handle notification clicks to open/focus app. Store subscription in backend.
